name: codex-comment-checker
description: Run comment-checker after Codex file edits and expose a comment_check MCP tool.

interface.longDescription: Codex Comment Checker runs the native comment-checker after apply_patch and other edit-style tool calls, feeds warnings back to Codex through PostToolUse hook feedback, and exposes a comment_check MCP tool for explicit checks.
defaultPrompt: Check comments in the files I just edited.
Run comment_check on this diff before finalizing.
